tasks.objective: Review pull request https://github.com/Nivesh353/test-agent-2/pull/1 across security, correctness, and performance dimensions

steps.description: Cloned repo and fetched PR branch. Retrieved diff — two files changed: .gitagent/state.json (new) and memory/MEMORY.md (new)

Inspected all changed files and repo context. PR adds .gitagent/state.json and memory/MEMORY.md — both auto-generated by a gitagent session. Now performing security, correctness, and performance analysis.
